sections.biography-source-undefined: Zhang Zun was the son of Zhang Bao. He served in the Shu administration as Secretariat Minister. In 263, he joined Zhuge Zhan in resisting a major Wei invasion. full_text:
Zhang Zun 張遵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zun (張遵)was born in Zhuo commandery. Joined Zhuge Zhan in resisting Deng Ai, killed in action. Zhang Zun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Zun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Zhang Zun was the son of Zhang Bao. He served in the Shu administration as Secretariat Minister. In 263, he joined Zhuge Zhan in resisting a major Wei invasion. At Mianzhu, they initially held off the Wei generals Deng Zhong and Shi Zuan, but were eventually overwhelmed and killed in action. Their heads were decapitated from their bodies.
